title: Modern Furniture
description: Build your own decoration and world!
body:
IdeaMineCreator is no longer active. This project has been discontinued.
Thank you for your support, and wishing you all the best.

[![Download Forge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/910417d8782751248adb53cc3ad2afc76452f735.png)](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/)[![Download NeoForge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d7cb7c9cf44eab16e94cdde1f218fb1ec7699cf.png)](https://neoforged.net/)![Coming Soon for Fabric!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4de487ddb128c4dbaa296c867dddb8eb0f8c9f04.png)[![Requires Optifine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40c25e93195389e8fdc679bc1f140b3cd10d0954.png)](https://optifine.net/downloads)[![YouTube](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d830fc60c37671759b215dfec810eba77071a0dc.png)](https://www.youtube.com/@IdeaMineCreator)[![YoutubeforVietnamese](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ea34934f26032145c8a2baae52688b983afe331.png)](https://www.youtube.com/@nhatckq)

## **Information:**

Welcome to Modern Furniture. It's the only mod comes from **Patreon** that you can now decorate your house, buildings, interior room and many things by the most realistic world. You can now download it for low textures (x128 textures) which is available in Curseforge.

**If you love and want the highest quality (textures from x256, x512 and x1024) for this mod and the emissive textures fix, get it now only on:**

[![Support me on Patreon!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5fcd3ed84b397a9c68ae8dee7c796644a2cdf59.png)](https://www.patreon.com/ideaminecreator) or Ko-fi (for coming soon!)

## **It adds:**
- Adds in 300+ blocks (tables, chairs, TV, kitchens, electronics,...) to create the world.
- Some technology models (computers, laptops,...) can be turned on/off.
- Many more!!

## **Requires:** 
- Forge: [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads)
- NeoForge: Unfortunately, NeoForge doesn't have any native mods that add support for emissive textures. You can use this method to get the emissive textures (big thanks to Deftesthawk from CurseForge for that!): [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector), [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity), [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) (NeoForge Version) or [Embeddium](https://modrinth.com/mod/embeddium)

## **Need Helpppp!**

Join me on my Discord. You can ask me if some problems or errors that impact you while using my mod, I'll find and solve them. Otherwise, you can also make some suggestions to help me create together, which is importantly part of society as well as you'll get some updates and announcements.



I hope you enjoy using my mod, and don't hesitate to send screenshot on X (formerly Twitter) or Discord, or make you own showcases including my mod on social media. Thank you so much and have a wonderful day!




This mod made by IdeaMineCreator (NhatCKQ in Vietnamese) from MCreator. Do not re-upload my mod without permission!
